summary: Closed M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 after PR #26 merged into main at 3ded0126d251fc44e0397187750c2fd6c5ebebb6. The M2 task graph is now integrated, both task graph subthreads are closed, and M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 is the next READY task.

tests_run.result: PR #26 MERGED into main with merge commit 3ded0126d251fc44e0397187750c2fd6c5ebebb6.
HEAD/main/origin/main at 3ded012 chore(tasks): create M2 task graph (#26).
M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 is CLOSED and M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 is READY.

decisions: Close M2-TASK-GRAPH-001 only after confirming PR #26 entered main.
Clear active task graph threads after close_agent returned completed statuses for systems_architect and qa_reviewer.
Promote M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 to READY as the next dependency-satisfied M2 task; do not start implementation in this closure commit.
risks: M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 is a research/policy task and must still produce its own historical_researcher handoff and independent qa_reviewer acceptance before integration.
M1 follow-up risks remain active until M2-HOST-HASH-CANARY-001 and M2-BOOT-BOUNDARY-001 are completed.
requested_action: After this closure commit is integrated, start M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001 with historical_researcher under the current model-routing matrix.
